g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the cart store work with Zustand?')
sendPrompt('What does the Cart page look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the Checkout page collect?')
sendPrompt('How does the incomplete order detection work?')

sendPrompt('How is a completed order processed?')

sendPrompt('How does fake order detection work?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin orders dashboard show?')
g.text: Admin orders dashboard — completed · incomplete · fake
